productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock visible retained-pressure vent
lastRefinementUnit.result: Stormlock now converts the retained Signal Cut pressure into four visible reel-time pulses through the existing pressure facade, with one authoritative meter and reused HUD, renderer, camera, audio, and bounded effect owners.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock visible-pressure-vent feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: The retained Signal Cut pressure now drains through four authored reel-time pulses before Stormlock lock, keeping the existing route-cargo pressure facade authoritative while the meter, pulse-stage copy, consequence line, beam, sparks, camera, and audio expose progress.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, all route JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed the shortcut through Fork Relay, four Stormlock pulses, Cacheline, and the 175-cargo Windglass score; exercised real failure and keyboard retry; checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure; held bounded DOM, canvas, descriptor, scene, and heap behavior; and reported zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen, Stormlock demand, mid-vent pulse, and secured state with diagnostics closed. Matched fresh-browser active-play performance improved from 19.61 to 21.67 FPS, p95 held near 67 ms, and no count growth appeared.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Pending production commit and fetch-before-push publication; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Keep the final zero-pressure Stormlock confirmation visible for one short branch-aware beat before the Cacheline or Slipstream payoff instruction replaces it, using the existing route-choice sequence and no new state owner.
